landing.headline: You say it. TWOS gets it done.
landing.subheadline: Turn thoughts, tasks, and projects into coordinated AI work.
landing.explanation: TWOS brings together AI models — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, and more — to plan, act, check, and improve the result.
landing.controlLine: You stay in control before anything runs.
landing.improvementLine: Every run can become feedback, guardrails, and a better next run.
landing.composerPlaceholder: What do you want to get done?
landing.composerHelper: Describe an idea, decision, project, research question, document, workflow, or recap.
landing.modelNote: The AI team is generated for each task.
